criticalError.title: Critical error
criticalError.body: The application encountered an unexpected error. Reload the page; if the problem persists, contact your administrator.

appError.title: Something went wrong
appError.body: Something went wrong on our end. You can try again; if the problem persists, contact your firm administrator.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This page doesn't exist, has been moved, or isn't accessible to you.
